scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn with zero-padded default-pattern date string throws DateTimeParseException
scenarios.precondition: DateSchemaColumn created with null pattern (uses default 'uuuu-M-d')
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseAndAddToColumn fails on zero-padded default-pattern input

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn with malformed custom-pattern date string throws DateTimeParseException
scenarios.expectedResult: DateTimeParseException is thrown when parsing '5-3-2022' that does not match 'dd/MM/yyyy'
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parseAndAddToColumn fails on malformed custom-pattern input
